doc_title: Waters of the United States — EPA/Army Corps Final Rule
label: partial
reason: The document cites the real 2023 WOTUS rule but incorrectly implies the rule was published with the "continuous surface connection" standard already conformed to the *Sackett* decision, which actually post-dated the January 2023 rule.
